Apply Now

Explore Our Programs

Specialized, placement-focused certificate programs that turn graduates into job-ready retail bankers.

Home / Programs

PGCRBF Program

Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking & Finance. Prepares graduates for customer service, transactions management, sales, and retail bank portfolio roles.

Enquire Now

PGCRBO Program

Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking Operations. A comprehensive operational course for graduates targeting non-sales corporate roles inside banks.

Enquire Now

Course Highlights

  • Retail banking fundamentals, products, and processes
  • KYC, compliance, and branch operations
  • Sales, liabilities, and customer relationship management
  • Credit basics and risk awareness
  • Communication, grooming, and mock interview preparation

Both core programs run for approximately 2 months of structured, intensive training, including assessments, mock interviews, and placement preparation.

Delivered through live online interactive sessions led by senior ex-banker faculty, supported by offline counseling at our Maharashtra centers.

Open to graduates from any stream, typically aged 0-28 years. No prior finance background required.

Request Program Details
